title: Huawei 10G SFP+ optical transceiver, SM, 1310nm, 10km, 2x LC konektor, DDM
description: The Huawei OSX010000 is a single-mode 10G SFP+ module with a wavelength of 1310nm and two LC connectors for connections up to 10km The LC connectors in the SFP module have UPC polishing
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 10 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 Distance [km] 10 Transfer type 2-fiber Polishing type UPC Tx power [dBm] 8,2 up to 0,5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 12,6 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
